name: okcredit-finternship
description: VoltCommerce is a modern, dynamic e-commerce prototype tailored for the electrical and hardware goods market. It features a unique "live market" pricing model where product prices fluctuate daily based on market volatility, and a Merchant Portal that syncs inventory in real-time across the storefront.

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
